property.name: polaris_log_dir
property.description: Directory for Polaris logs.

property.name: polaris_pid_dir
property.description: Directory for Polaris PID files.

property.name: polaris_conf_dir
property.description: Polaris configuration directory.

property.name: polaris_conf_file
property.description: Polaris configuration file name.

property.name: polaris_data_dir
property.description: Polaris data directory.

property.name: polaris_user
property.description: Polaris service user.

property.name: polaris_keytab
property.description: Keytab used by the Polaris service principal.

property.name: polaris_principal
property.description: Kerberos principal for the Polaris service.

property.name: polaris_jaas_file
property.description: JAAS file used when Kerberos is enabled.

property.name: polaris_jaas_context
property.description: JAAS login context name for Polaris.

property.name: polaris_protocol
property.description: Protocol used for Polaris service checks and links.

property.name: polaris_ssl_enabled
property.description: Enable HTTPS/TLS for Polaris server.

property.name: polaris_ssl_auto_generate
property.description: Generate a self-signed server keystore automatically when TLS is enabled and keystore file is missing.

property.name: polaris_ssl_keystore_password
property.description: Password used for Polaris TLS server keystore.

property.name: polaris_ssl_truststore_password
property.description: Password used for Polaris TLS truststore.

property.name: polaris_filesystem_type
property.description: Preferred filesystem for Polaris storage and integration paths.

property.name: polaris_opts
property.description: Additional JVM options for the Polaris server.

property.name: polaris_mcp_home
property.description: Home directory of the Polaris tools package that provides the polaris-mcp launcher.

property.name: polaris_mcp_transport
property.description: Transport mode for POLARIS_MCP_SERVER. Use http/sse for managed daemons; stdio is only for interactive clients.

property.name: polaris_mcp_protocol
property.description: Protocol used by Polaris MCP quicklinks and checks.

property.name: polaris_mcp_host
property.description: Host interface bound by the MCP server process.

property.name: polaris_mcp_port
property.description: Port used by the MCP server for HTTP/SSE transports.

property.name: polaris_mcp_tls_enabled
property.description: Enable TLS for POLARIS_MCP_SERVER endpoint.

property.name: polaris_mcp_tls_auto_generate
property.description: Automatically generate self-signed PEM certificate/key for MCP when TLS is enabled and files are missing.

property.name: polaris_mcp_tls_cert_file
property.description: PEM certificate chain file used by POLARIS_MCP_SERVER HTTPS endpoint.

property.name: polaris_mcp_tls_key_file
property.description: PEM private key file used by POLARIS_MCP_SERVER HTTPS endpoint.

property.name: polaris_mcp_tls_ca_file
property.description: Optional PEM CA bundle for MCP TLS server configuration.

property.name: polaris_mcp_base_url
property.description: Base URL used by MCP tools to call Polaris REST APIs. Leave empty to auto-derive from POLARIS_SERVER.

property.name: polaris_mcp_start_command
property.description: Optional full override for the POLARIS_MCP_SERVER start command.

property.name: polaris_mcp_stop_command
property.description: Optional full override for the POLARIS_MCP_SERVER stop command.

property.name: polaris_console_home
property.description: Home directory of Polaris tools package that provides the polaris-console launcher.

property.name: polaris_console_host
property.description: Host interface bound by Polaris Console process.

property.name: polaris_console_protocol
property.description: Protocol used by the Polaris Console quicklink.

property.name: polaris_console_port
property.description: Port used by the embedded static Polaris Console web server.

property.name: polaris_console_tls_enabled
property.description: Enable TLS for POLARIS_CONSOLE endpoint.

property.name: polaris_console_tls_auto_generate
property.description: Automatically generate self-signed PEM certificate/key for Console when TLS is enabled and files are missing.

property.name: polaris_console_tls_cert_file
property.description: PEM certificate chain file used by POLARIS_CONSOLE HTTPS endpoint.

property.name: polaris_console_tls_key_file
property.description: PEM private key file used by POLARIS_CONSOLE HTTPS endpoint.

property.name: polaris_console_start_command
property.description: Optional full override for the POLARIS_CONSOLE start command.

property.name: polaris_console_stop_command
property.description: Optional full override for the POLARIS_CONSOLE stop command.

property.name: polaris_admin_username
property.description: Client ID used to bootstrap Polaris internal root credentials.

property.name: polaris_admin_password
property.description: Client secret used to bootstrap Polaris internal root credentials.

property.name: polaris_bootstrap_realms
property.description: Comma-separated list of realms to bootstrap with Polaris internal credentials.

property.name: polaris_oidc_use_cluster_config
property.description: Use cluster-level OIDC settings (oidc-env) to configure Polaris external authentication.

property.name: polaris_oidc_override_auth_server_url
property.display-name: Polaris OIDC Auth Server URL Override
property.description: Override auth server URL for Polaris OIDC when not using cluster OIDC configuration.

property.name: polaris_oidc_override_client_id
property.description: Override client id for Polaris OIDC when not using cluster OIDC configuration.

property.name: polaris_oidc_override_client_secret
property.description: Override client secret for Polaris OIDC when not using cluster OIDC configuration.

property.name: content
property.description: This is the jinja template for polaris-env.sh file
